schemes.name: Vidyakiran Scholarship
schemes.description: Financial aid for students from low-income families to support their education.

schemes.name: Karunya Health Scheme
schemes.description: Free medical treatment and financial assistance for BPL families in Kerala dealing with severe diseases.

schemes.name: LIFE Mission
schemes.description: Comprehensive housing scheme providing secure and safe housing for the homeless and landless in Kerala.

schemes.name: Snehapoorvam Scheme
schemes.description: Financial support for orphans and vulnerable children living in families to ensure their uninterrupted education and well-being.

schemes.name: Widow Pension Scheme (Indira Gandhi National Widow Pension)
schemes.description: Monthly financial assistance for widows living below the poverty line to support their livelihood.
